title: Comme il vous plaira
summaries: "Comme il vous plaira" by William Shakespeare is a pastoral comedy written in 1599. When Rosalind flees her uncle's court to escape persecution, she seeks refuge in the Forest of Arden with her cousin Celia. There, they encounter memorable characters including the melancholy Jaques, who delivers the famous "All the world's a stage" speech. In this woodland refuge, Rosalind will discover not only safety but also love, while navigating the contrasts between court life and country existence. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
